entity.label: Salt
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: One of the cities of Judah (Josh. 15:62), probably in the Valley of Salt, at the southern end of the Dead Sea.

nodes.label: Salt
nodes.description: One of the cities of Judah (Josh. 15:62), probably in the Valley of Salt, at the southern end of the Dead Sea.

verses.text: And Nibshan, and the city of Salt, and Engedi; six cities with their villages.
